title: Heal - House Call Doctor Platform
problem: Primary care access requires patients to travel to clinics. Elderly and mobility-limited patients struggle with in-person visits.
solution: Platform for booking house call doctor visits. On-demand and scheduled in-home primary care visits with EHR integration.
technology: Booking platform, dispatch logistics, mobile EHR
target_customer: Patients, especially elderly and families, health plans
traction_signals: Hundreds of thousands of house calls
regulatory_notes: State medical licensing, HIPAA, house call regulations
varden_fit: MEDIUM - House call platform. Shows alternative care delivery model.
notes: boring_software=true, contrarian=false. In-home care delivery. Infrastructure for house calls.
